title: Blockchain Core Components & Relationships
description: A flowchart illustrating the core technical components of a blockchain and their sequential relationships in the process of adding a new block.
elements: Block Header (Hash, Previous Hash, Nonce, etc.)
relationships: Transactions are bundled into a block
Block Header cryptographically hashes the block's data
Merkle Root provides a fingerprint for all transactions in the block
Nodes use a Consensus Mechanism to validate the new block
Validated block is appended to the previous block in the Distributed Ledger
